mapper.sql: GOODS_PIC, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_TITLE, GOODS_PRICE, GOODS_NUM, GOODS_CODE, GOODS_NUMBER, GOODS_FORSALE, GOODS_BEST, GOODS_NEW, GOODS_HOT, GOODS_BRAND, MEMBER_PRICE, GOODS_DISCOUNT1, GOODS_DISCOUNT2, MARKET_PRICE, MEMBER_GIFTPOINTS, MEMBER_LEVGIFTPOINTS, MEMBER_POINTTOPRICE, ACTIVITY_PRICE, ACTIVITY_DATE1, GOODS_THUMBNAIL, GOODS_DETAILS, GOODS_WEIGHT, GOODS_LOW, GOODS_CUSTOM, GOODS_FREETRAFFIC, GOODS_KEYWORDS, GOODS_INTRODUCTION, GOODS_ORDER, ACTIVITY_DATE2, GOODS_DELFLAG, GOODS_MODEL, GOODS_CATEGORY, GOODS_CATEGORY1, GOODS_CATEGORY2, GOODS_CATEGORY3, GOODS_CATEGORY4, GOODS_DETAILSPIC, GOODS_ID
mapper.update:
update
set GOODS_PIC = #{GOODS_PIC}, GOODS_NAME = #{GOODS_NAME}, GOODS_TITLE = #{GOODS_TITLE}, GOODS_NUM = #{GOODS_NUM}, GOODS_CODE = #{GOODS_CODE}, GOODS_NUMBER = #{GOODS_NUMBER}, GOODS_FORSALE = #{GOODS_FORSALE}, GOODS_BEST = #{GOODS_BEST}, GOODS_NEW = #{GOODS_NEW}, GOODS_HOT = #{GOODS_HOT}, GOODS_BRAND = #{GOODS_BRAND}, MEMBER_PRICE = #{MEMBER_PRICE}, GOODS_DISCOUNT1 = #{GOODS_DISCOUNT1}, GOODS_DISCOUNT2 = #{GOODS_DISCOUNT2}, MARKET_PRICE = #{MARKET_PRICE}, MEMBER_GIFTPOINTS = #{MEMBER_GIFTPOINTS}, MEMBER_LEVGIFTPOINTS = #{MEMBER_LEVGIFTPOINTS}, MEMBER_POINTTOPRICE = #{MEMBER_POINTTOPRICE}, ACTIVITY_PRICE = #{ACTIVITY_PRICE}, ACTIVITY_DATE1 = #{ACTIVITY_DATE1}, GOODS_THUMBNAIL = #{GOODS_THUMBNAIL}, GOODS_DETAILS = #{GOODS_DETAILS}, GOODS_WEIGHT = #{GOODS_WEIGHT}, GOODS_LOW = #{GOODS_LOW}, GOODS_CUSTOM = #{GOODS_CUSTOM}, GOODS_FREETRAFFIC = #{GOODS_FREETRAFFIC}, GOODS_KEYWORDS = #{GOODS_KEYWORDS}, GOODS_INTRODUCTION = #{GOODS_INTRODUCTION}, GOODS_ORDER = #{GOODS_ORDER}, ACTIVITY_DATE2 = #{ACTIVITY_DATE2}, GOODS_DELFLAG = #{GOODS_DELFLAG}, GOODS_MODEL = #{GOODS_MODEL}, GOODS_CATEGORY = #{GOODS_CATEGORY}, GOODS_DETAILSPIC = #{GOODS_DETAILSPIC}, GOODS_ID = GOODS_ID where GOODS_ID = #{GOODS_ID}

update
set GOODS_CATEGORY1 = #{GOODS_CATEGORY1}, GOODS_ID = GOODS_ID where GOODS_ID = #{GOODS_ID}

update
set
GOODS_PRICE = #{GOODS_PRICE},
GOODS_ID = GOODS_ID where GOODS_ID = #{GOODS_ID}
mapper.select: select * from shop_attribute where attributeprice = (select min(attributeprice) from shop_attribute where goods_id = #{GOODS_ID} and ATTRIBUTENUM>0) and goods_id = #{GOODS_ID} LIMIT 1

select ,CATEGORY_NAME from
left join SHOP_CATEGORY on SHOP_GOODS.GOODS_CATEGORY=SHOP_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID where 1=1
and ( GOODS_CODE LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{pd.keywords}),'%') or GOODS_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{pd.keywords}),'%') )
and (SHOP_CATEGORY.SUPER_ID = #{pd.SUPER_ID} or SHOP_GOODS.GOODS_CATEGORY1 like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{pd.SUPER_ID}),'%') )
and (GOODS_CATEGORY = #{pd.GOODS_CATEGORY} or GOODS_CATEGORY1 like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{pd.GOODS_CATEGORY}),'%') )
and GOODS_HOT = #{pd.GOODS_HOT}
and GOODS_FORSALE = #{pd.GOODS_FORSALE}
and (goods_delflag is null or goods_delflag != 1)
and goods_delflag = 1
order by ${pd.ORDERFLAG} ${pd.SORTSTRING},GOODS_ID DESC
order by ${pd.ORDERFLAG},GOODS_ID DESC
order by GOODS_ORDER DESC,GOODS_ID DESC

select
from
where 1 = 1
and GOODS_ID in (${GOODS_IDS})
